text: Competitive dynamics intensified following Google's announcement of enhanced image editing capabilities in its Gemini app, which sent Adobe stock lower by 1.7% on the news [C018]. The Gemini upgrade potentially threatens Adobe's dominance in the digital imaging market, contributing to investor concerns about competitive positioning [C016]. This competitive pressure comes as the broader motion graphics market is expected to reach approximately USD 280 Billion by 2034, growing at a 12.2% CAGR between 2025 and 2034, with Adobe identified as a key market player alongside Autodesk and Maxon [C008].
